what: Visualization functions for the hospitraceR package
title: Visualization functions for the hospitraceR package
text: Opinionated visualization functions hospitraceR package, provides tools detecting analyzing transmission clusters healthcare settings using whole-genome sequencing data. package provides functions plotting phylogenetic trees combined per-patient location traces, cluster comparison heatmaps, overlap permutation-test figures, genetic-context summaries.

title: Visualization functions for the hospitraceR package
text: hospitraceRVisualize available CRAN yet, can install GitHub using devtools:

title: Visualization functions for the hospitraceR package
text: full function reference available package documentation, detailed examples vignettes, please visit main documentation site hospitraceR.

what: Compute the per-isolate genetic distance needed to cluster each isolate — cluster_intra_distances_long
title: Compute the per-isolate genetic distance needed to cluster each isolate — cluster_intra_distances_long
text: Drops singletons returns, per remaining cluster, one row per isolate giving genetic distance SNV-threshold clustering need place isolate cluster: distances members aggregated linkage rule (nearest member single, farthest complete). Clusters visited sort(unique(...)) order factor levels come sorted.

title: Compute the per-isolate genetic distance needed to cluster each isolate — cluster_intra_distances_long
Compute the per-isolate genetic distance needed to cluster each isolate — cluster_intra_distances_long
text: clusters Vector named sequence IDs giving sequence's cluster. snp_dist Matrix SNP distances isolates. linkage Linkage rule, "single" "complete".

title: Compute the per-isolate genetic distance needed to cluster each isolate — cluster_intra_distances_long
text: data frame cluster factor column numeric distance column.

what: Compute each cluster's maximum intra-cluster SNP distance — cluster_max_intra_distances
title: Compute each cluster's maximum intra-cluster SNP distance — cluster_max_intra_distances
text: Drops singletons computes remaining cluster's maximum within-cluster distance via hospitraceR::cluster_pairwise_distances(). Clusters visited sort(unique(...)) order hospitraceR::cluster_inter_distances(), result lines row--row matrix two can plotted directly .

title: Compute each cluster's maximum intra-cluster SNP distance — cluster_max_intra_distances
Compute each cluster's maximum intra-cluster SNP distance — cluster_max_intra_distances
text: clusters Vector named sequence IDs giving sequence's cluster. snp_dist Matrix SNP distances isolates.

title: Compute each cluster's maximum intra-cluster SNP distance — cluster_max_intra_distances
text: named numeric vector max intra-cluster distances, one per non-singleton cluster.

what: Map clusters onto a phylogenetic tree — plot_clusters_phylo
title: Map clusters onto a phylogenetic tree — plot_clusters_phylo
text: Plots phylogenetic tree tips colored cluster. minimal base plot: takes tree cluster assignments, plus optional sequence--patient mapping tip labels.

title: Map clusters onto a phylogenetic tree — plot_clusters_phylo
Map clusters onto a phylogenetic tree — plot_clusters_phylo
text: tree phylogenetic tree class phylo. clusters Vector named sequence IDs giving sequence's cluster. seq2pt Optional named vector mapping sequence IDs patient IDs; given, adds patient tip labels.

title: Map clusters onto a phylogenetic tree — plot_clusters_phylo
text: ggtree object clusters visualized tree.

what: Plot a jittered scatter of two per-cluster genetic-distance measures with a y = x reference line — plot_genetic_context_scatter
title: Plot a jittered scatter of two per-cluster genetic-distance measures with a y = x reference line — plot_genetic_context_scatter
text: Plot jittered scatter two per-cluster genetic-distance measures y = x reference line

Plot a jittered scatter of two per-cluster genetic-distance measures with a y = x reference line — plot_genetic_context_scatter
text: x, y Numeric vectors per-cluster distances axis. xlab, ylab Axis labels.

what: Plot the per-isolate genetic distance needed to cluster each isolate, by cluster — plot_genetic_distance_by_cluster
title: Plot the per-isolate genetic distance needed to cluster each isolate, by cluster — plot_genetic_distance_by_cluster
text: every non-singleton cluster, plots genetic distance SNV-threshold clustering need place isolate cluster (clusters x, distance y, one jittered point per isolate). Single linkage uses isolate's nearest cluster-mate; "complete" uses farthest. boxplot summarizes cluster.

title: Plot the per-isolate genetic distance needed to cluster each isolate, by cluster — plot_genetic_distance_by_cluster
Plot the per-isolate genetic distance needed to cluster each isolate, by cluster — plot_genetic_distance_by_cluster
text: clusters Vector named sequence IDs giving sequence's cluster; singletons dropped. snp_dist Matrix SNP distances isolates. linkage Linkage rule, "single" "complete".

title: Plot the per-isolate genetic distance needed to cluster each isolate, by cluster — plot_genetic_distance_by_cluster
text: ggplot object, suitable saving ggsave().

what: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-cluster genetic distance — plot_intra_vs_inter_cluster_distance
title: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-cluster genetic distance — plot_intra_vs_inter_cluster_distance
text: Plots cluster's maximum within-cluster distance minimum distance isolate another cluster. Points y = x clusters whose internal diversity exceeds separation nearest cluster.

title: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-cluster genetic distance — plot_intra_vs_inter_cluster_distance
Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-cluster genetic distance — plot_intra_vs_inter_cluster_distance
text: clusters Vector named sequence IDs giving sequence's cluster; singletons dropped sequences still count unclustered isolates. snp_dist Matrix SNP distances isolates; row column names define full isolate universe, including unclustered isolates.

title: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-cluster genetic distance — plot_intra_vs_inter_cluster_distance
text: ggplot object, suitable saving ggsave().

title: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-isolate genetic distance — plot_intra_vs_inter_isolate_distance

Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-isolate genetic distance — plot_intra_vs_inter_isolate_distance

title: Plot a heatmap of Jaccard similarity between two clusterings — plot_jaccard_similarity_heatmap
text: Plots pairwise Jaccard overlap clusters two clusterings sequences, overall fraction exactly-matching clusters title.

Plot a heatmap of Jaccard similarity between two clusterings — plot_jaccard_similarity_heatmap
text: clusters1 Vector named sequence IDs giving sequence's cluster. clusters2 Vector named sequence IDs clusters1 giving sequence's cluster. width Width heatmap. height Height heatmap.

what: Plot overlap permutation test results as violin plots — plot_overlap_perm_test
title: Plot overlap permutation test results as violin plots — plot_overlap_perm_test
text: Renders core convert-weighted overlap figure: per trace type, violin permuted (null) pooled overlap fractions inner boxplot, observed pooled fraction red diamond, observed counts (n_overlap/n_converts) labeled violin. Violins filled overlap group (co-occurrence vs sequential). core figure drawn. Cross-cluster/sequence-type aggregation, significance annotations, trace-type-specific dividers headers left caller add returned plot.

title: Plot overlap permutation test results as violin plots — plot_overlap_perm_test
code: plot_overlap_perm_test(   perm_df,   obs_df,   title = "Overlap Permutation Test Results",   subtitle = NULL,   trace_labels = c(facility = "Facility", floor = "Floor", room = "Room", seq_facility =     "Facility", seq_floor = "Floor", seq_room = "Room"),   x_label = "Trace type",   y_label = "Fraction of converts with overlap (convert-weighted)" )

title: Plot overlap permutation test results as violin plots — plot_overlap_perm_test
text: perm_df Long null-distribution data frame, one row per (trace type, permutation), columns trace_type (factor; levels set x-axis order) overlap_fraction. obs_df Observed values, one row per trace type, columns trace_type (levels perm_df), overlap_fraction, n_overlap, n_converts. title Plot title. subtitle Plot subtitle, NULL none. trace_labels Named character vector mapping trace_type levels x-axis labels. x_label, y_label Axis titles.

title: Plot overlap permutation test results as violin plots — plot_overlap_perm_test
text: ggplot object violin plots overlap type.

what: Create a standalone legend for trace phylogeny plots — plot_trace_phylo_legend
title: Create a standalone legend for trace phylogeny plots — plot_trace_phylo_legend
text: Generates combined legend plot trace locations, surveillance results, patient categories can saved separately main plot.

title: Create a standalone legend for trace phylogeny plots — plot_trace_phylo_legend
code: plot_trace_phylo_legend(   trace_colors = trace_color_palette(),   trace_labels = NULL,   surv_colors = surv_dot_colors(),   surv_shapes = surv_dot_shapes(),   label_colors = c(index = "red", `multiply-colonized-index` = "darkred", `weak-index` =     "orange", convert = "black", `adm-pos` = "forestgreen", `adm-pos-convert` = "blue",     `secondary-convert` = "gray", `ambiguous-adm-pos` = "turquoise3", `ambiguous-convert`     = "deeppink3"),   include_trace = TRUE,   include_surv = TRUE,   include_patient = TRUE,   title_size = 10,   text_size = 8,   key_size = 0.5,   layout = c("horizontal", "vertical") )

title: Create a standalone legend for trace phylogeny plots — plot_trace_phylo_legend
text: trace_colors Color palette trace location values; match plot_trace_phylo_tree(). trace_labels Character vector labels per trace location; length match trace_colors. surv_colors Named colors surveillance types; match plot_trace_phylo_tree(). surv_shapes Named integer plotting shapes surveillance types; match plot_trace_phylo_tree(). label_colors Named colors patient category labels; match plot_trace_phylo_tree(). include_trace Logical. Include trace location legend. include_surv Logical. Include surveillance legend. include_patient Logical. Include patient category legend. title_size Numeric. Font size legend titles. text_size Numeric. Font size legend text. key_size Numeric. Size legend keys cm. layout Character. "horizontal" places legends side--side, "vertical" stacks .

title: Create a standalone legend for trace phylogeny plots — plot_trace_phylo_legend
text: ggplot object containing legend(s), suitable saving ggsave().

what: Plot a phylogeny with a presence/absence trace heatmap and surveillance overlay — plot_trace_phylo_presence
title: Plot a phylogeny with a presence/absence trace heatmap and surveillance overlay — plot_trace_phylo_presence
text: Creates combined visualization phylogenetic tree patient presence/absence trace heatmap. Surveillance data encoded directly cell colors (dots): dark gray presence, white absence, surveillance colors results.

title: Plot a phylogeny with a presence/absence trace heatmap and surveillance overlay — plot_trace_phylo_presence
code: plot_trace_phylo_presence(   tree,   isolate_lookup,   trace_data,   surv_df,   cluster_filter = NULL,   presence_color = "gray85",   surv_colors = c(neg = "blue", pos = "red") )

title: Plot a phylogeny with a presence/absence trace heatmap and surveillance overlay — plot_trace_phylo_presence
text: tree phylogenetic tree class phylo. isolate_lookup Data frame get_isolate_lookup() columns isolate_id, patient_id, date, cluster, adm_pos, prev_surv. trace_data Binary matrix (0/1) patient IDs row names dates column names. surv_df Surveillance data frame columns patient_id, genome_id, surv_date, result (0/1 negative/positive). cluster_filter Cluster IDs include, NULL . presence_color Color presence cells. surv_colors Named colors negative positive surveillance types.

title: Plot a phylogeny with a presence/absence trace heatmap and surveillance overlay — plot_trace_phylo_presence
text: ggplot object combining tree, heatmap, surveillance overlay.

what: Plot a phylogeny with a location trace heatmap — plot_trace_phylo_tree
title: Plot a phylogeny with a location trace heatmap — plot_trace_phylo_tree
text: Creates combined visualization phylogenetic tree patient location trace heatmap. Uses ggtree phylogeny continuous line segments trace data (discrete cells). Surveillance data overlaid dots.

title: Plot a phylogeny with a location trace heatmap — plot_trace_phylo_tree
code: plot_trace_phylo_tree(   tree,   isolate_lookup,   trace_data,   surv_df,   cluster_filter = NULL,   trace_colors = trace_color_palette(),   surv_colors = surv_dot_colors(),   surv_halos = surv_dot_halos(),   surv_shapes = surv_dot_shapes(),   clust_patient_categories = NULL,   label_colors = c(index = "red", `multiply-colonized-index` = "darkred", `weak-index` =     "orange", convert = "black", `adm-pos` = "forestgreen", `adm-pos-convert` = "blue",     `secondary-convert` = "gray", `ambiguous-adm-pos` = "turquoise3", `ambiguous-convert`     = "deeppink3", other = "purple"),   inches_per_row = 0.2,   row_thickness = 0.55,   max_tree_width = 0.08,   show_legend = TRUE )

title: Plot a phylogeny with a location trace heatmap — plot_trace_phylo_tree
text: tree phylogenetic tree class phylo. isolate_lookup Data frame get_isolate_lookup() columns isolate_id, patient_id, date, cluster, adm_pos, prev_surv. trace_data Matrix patient IDs row names numeric dates column names; values location categories (0 = absent, 1+ = locations). surv_df Surveillance data frame columns patient_id, genome_id, surv_date, result (0/1 negative/positive). cluster_filter Cluster IDs include, NULL . trace_colors Color palette trace location values. surv_colors Named fill colors surveillance types (neg, pos_clust, pos_nonclust). surv_halos Named outline (halo) colors, keyed like surv_colors. surv_shapes Named integer plotting shapes (filled, 21-25), keyed like surv_colors. clust_patient_categories Named list cluster_patient_categorization() mapping patient_id category per cluster; NULL labels patients "". label_colors Named colors patient category labels; "" fallback tip assigned category. inches_per_row Height inches per patient row saving. row_thickness Proportion row spacing used trace bar height. max_tree_width Maximum tree width proportion time range; branch lengths scaled fit. show_legend Logical. Attach figure's legends (location, patient status, surveillance); FALSE selects separate-legend path.

title: Plot a phylogeny with a location trace heatmap — plot_trace_phylo_tree
text: ggplot object following attributes consistent sizing: recommended_height: Suggested height inches recommended_width: Suggested width inches n_patients: Number patients plot inches_per_row: Height allocated per patient row Use saving ggsave() maintain consistent row heights. show_legend = TRUE figure carries native legends returned object single ggplot/ggtree; recommended_width widened fit legend.
